title: Riverside, CA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Riverside, CA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Riverside is a city in CA with a population of 314,998. Inland Empire city with citrus heritage, cheaper than coastal CA, but still pricey.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
